kw.name: New Persistent Context
kw.msg: { "userDataDir": "", "browser": "chromium", "headless": true, "acceptDownloads": true, "bypassCSP": false, "chromiumSandbox": false, "devtools": false, "forcedColors": "none", "handleSIGHUP": true, "handleSIGINT": true, "handleSIGTERM": true, "ignoreHTTPSErrors": false, "javaScriptEnabled": true, "offline": false, "reducedMotion": "no-preference", "serviceWorkers": "allow", "slowMo": 0.0, "timeout": 30000.0, "url": "http://localhost:55865/plone", "viewport": { "height": 720, "width": 1280 }, "tracesDir": "/home/jensens/ws/cdev/p6/src/Products.CMFPlone/test_controlpanel_language/Scenario_Set_Site_Language_in_the_Language_Control_Panel/browser/traces/temp/3abd7876-90d8-419b-b2ed-65acea3cc3d7" }
